distinguishes.reason: Changes only amount relative to the automatically processed VIP/DAMAGED 12000-cent trace. The host-observed rule, decision, inventory state, and side effects can distinguish continued automatic replacement with immediate inventory movement from an unresolved high-value priority path that may defer inventory movement.

expectedInformationGain: Maximum for the remaining uncertainty: 75000 cents is materially above every automatically processed amount while preserving VIP, DAMAGED, SKU, and initial inventory from the existing replacement trace. This isolates the high-value dimension and lets one host execution reveal both whether a priority exception supersedes automatic processing and whether sellable/quarantine movement occurs immediately or is deferred, without predicting either result.
